plan_metadata.name: Sample Dice Roller in meeting Remote Debug

steps.description: Type 'Dice Roller in meeting' into the search input field at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension in Visual Studio Code.

Click the "Create" button associated with the "Dice Roller in meeting" sample in the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface of Visual Studio Code. And input ${{var:app_name:dice-roll}} into the run time variable.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selected default folder path ("home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects") in the "Workspace Folder" dialog within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion 'Preview README.MD' is visible
@assertion the page title contains 'Dice Roller - Live Share sample'
Perform a right-click on the "Preview README.md" tab in the Visual Studio Code interface at coordinates (397, 54), located in the upper section of the editor where open file tabs are displayed.
Click the "Close" option in the context menu within the Visual Studio Code interface to close the current file tab.
Press the F1 key to open the Command Palette in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension within Visual Studio Code.
Type the text 'Debug: Select and Start Debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette, which is opened with the prompt "Type the name of a command to run."
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted command, "Debug: Select and Start Debugging," from the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Type 'Launch Remote (Chrome)' into the debug configuration dropdown input at the top of the Visual Studio Code window to select a launch configuration.
Press the Enter key to select the highlighted "Launch Remote (Chrome)" option from the debug command dropdown in Visual Studio Code's command palette.
Click on the "Email, phone, or Skype" input field in the Microsoft account login interface.
Type text: ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}} into the input field labeled "Email, phone, or Skype" on the Microsoft login page.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the email address input and proceed by interacting with the "Next" button on the Microsoft login page.

Type text: ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}  into the password input field on the Microsoft login page (URL: login.microsoftonline.com) under the "Enter password" section for the user "test003@xxbdw.onmicrosoft.com".
Press the "Enter" key to submit the password and proceed from the Microsoft login page's "Enter password" field.
Click the "Yes" button in the Microsoft login prompt to confirm staying signed in.
Click the "Add" button in the pop-up window for the TeamsConversationBot app on the Microsoft Teams interface.
Click the "testing" meeting option under "Select a meeting" in the popup titled "DiceRoller.LiveSharelocal" within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Click the "Go" button in the DiceRoller.LiveSharelocal confirmation pop-up to proceed with app initialization.
Click the "Save" button located in the Dice Roller interface within Microsoft Teams, positioned at the bottom-right of the dialog box.
Click the "Join" button in the DiceRollerFluidLiveShare tab within the Microsoft Teams web app, located in the "testing" chat window.
Click the "Join now" button in the Teams meeting interface to proceed with joining the session.
Click the "Allow" button in the browser prompt titled "teams.microsoft.com wants to" to grant permission to manage windows across displays.
Click the "Share" button located at the bottom-right corner of the DiceRollerFluidLiveShare panel to share the Dice Roller content in the Microsoft Teams meeting.
@assertion 'Roll' is visible
